prompt: Create a refined editorial presentation cover slide in a warm, Claude-inspired design system. Use a landscape 16:9 composition with a parchment-paper background, subtle paper grain, soft shadows, and layered torn-paper collage elements. The overall palette should be warm ivory, cream, sand, charcoal, muted black, and terracotta accent. On the left half, place a small top label reading "{argument name="system label" default="Claude-inspired presentation system"}" with a small terracotta dot and a thin horizontal divider line. Below it, set an oversized elegant high-contrast serif headline in black that reads "{argument name="main headline" default="Thoughtful Systems"}", split across two lines and dominating the left side. Under the headline, add a smaller serif subheadline in terracotta reading "{argument name="subheadline" default="Warmth can still feel precise."}". Beneath that, create a vertical list of exactly 4 design principles, each on its own row with thin divider lines and a small icon at left: 1) a rectangular parchment-sheet icon with the text "Parchment canvas", 2) a serif capital T icon with the text "Serif-led hierarchy", 3) a filled terracotta circle icon with the text "Terracotta for signal", 4) a chain-link icon with the text "Organic diagrams over cold chrome". Add a tiny footer caption at bottom left reading "CLAUDE-INSPIRED PRESENTATION SYSTEM" in spaced small caps. On the right half, build a layered collage of exactly 3 paper cards: first, a tall off-white art card with a fine border containing the heading "A more considered approach", a short body paragraph about complex problems yielding to clarity, a minimal landscape line drawing with a terracotta sun, and a vertical terracotta botanical branch overlapping the card; second, a dark charcoal rectangular card partially behind it with the lowercase title "thinking process" and an exact 5-step numbered list: "01 Observe", "02 Interpret", "03 Connect", "04 Synthesize", "05 Act with care", plus a delicate circular orbital diagram in dotted lines and terracotta highlight; third, a torn off-white note card in front near the bottom with a hand-drawn overlapping-circles diagram where one crescent-shaped intersection area is shaded in terracotta, alongside a handwritten quote reading "{argument name="quote" default="Clarity emerges when systems are designed with intention."}". Include one extra light beige paper strip tucked beneath the lower cards. Emphasize tactile realism, elegant negative space, print-editorial sophistication, soft natural lighting, and a calm, thoughtful luxury-tech mood.
translatedPrompt: 创建一个精致的编辑风格演示封面幻灯片，采用温暖的 Claude 风格设计系统。使用 16:9 横向构图，背景为羊皮纸，带有细腻的纸张纹理、柔和的阴影以及分层的撕纸拼贴元素。整体色调应为暖象牙色、奶油色、沙色、炭灰色、柔和黑色以及赤陶色点缀。在左半部分，放置一个小标签，显示“{argument name="system label" default="Claude 风格演示系统"}”，配有一个赤陶色小圆点和一条细水平分割线。在其下方，设置一个超大且优雅的高对比度衬线标题，颜色为黑色，内容为“{argument name="main headline" default="Thoughtful Systems"}”，分为两行，占据左侧主要位置。在标题下方，添加一个较小的赤陶色衬线副标题，内容为“{argument name="subheadline" default="温暖亦可精准。"}”。在此之下，创建一个包含 4 个设计原则的垂直列表，每一项占一行，带有细分割线和左侧小图标：1) 一个矩形羊皮纸图标，文字为“羊皮纸画布”；2) 一个衬线大写字母 T 图标，文字为“衬线主导的层级”；3) 一个填充的赤陶色圆形图标，文字为“赤陶色用于信号提示”；4) 一个链条图标，文字为“有机图表胜过冷峻金属感”。在左下角添加一行微小的页脚说明，以间距较大的小写字母显示“CLAUDE-INSPIRED PRESENTATION SYSTEM”。在右半部分，构建一个由 3 张纸质卡片组成的分层拼贴：第一张是带有细边框的米白色高长艺术卡片，包含标题“更深思熟虑的方法”、一段关于复杂问题如何趋于清晰的简短正文、一幅带有赤陶色太阳的极简风景线条画，以及一张覆盖在卡片上的垂直赤陶色植物枝条；第二张是位于其后方的深炭灰色矩形卡片，带有小写标题“thinking process”和一个精确的 5 步编号列表：“01 Observe”、“02 Interpret”、“03 Connect”、“04 Synthesize”、“05 Act with care”，以及一个带有虚线和赤陶色高光的精致圆形轨道图；第三张是靠近底部前方的一张撕边米白色便签卡，上面有一个手绘的重叠圆圈图，其中一个新月形的交叉区域用赤陶色填充，旁边是一句手写引语：“{argument name="quote" default="当系统被有意设计时，清晰度便会显现。"}”。在底部卡片下方塞入一条额外的浅米色纸条。强调触感真实性、优雅的留白、印刷编辑的精致感、柔和的自然光影以及冷静、深思熟虑的奢华科技氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: Thoughtful Systems 演示封面：一款适用于 AI 或产品设计演示的温暖编辑风格幻灯片封面，采用羊皮纸纹理、衬线字体和赤陶色调的拼贴卡片设计。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 教程流程、方法论、商业流程、食谱步骤
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 82；构图: layered, vertical, horizontal；风格: editorial, luxury, hand-drawn；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, luxury, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
